criteria.criterion: Device at 59s still online; at 61s marked offline
Device sending heartbeat every 30s stays online for 120s
brain.js tool_use response contains text field
hub.js broadcasts wakeword event to all connected clients

docker-compose up starts service, HTTP port accessible
Docker config volume persists across container restart

Invalid profiles: service keeps last valid config, no crash
